response.justification: While the candidate has strong full-stack and polyglot programming experience, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains — both of which are mandatory for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor's thesis work and NI LabWindows, which is not equivalent to the required 5–10 years of commercial C++ in financial systems.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong DevOps and CI/CD practices demonstrated across roles
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows platform
Lacks any explicit capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
